title: Catbal on Hyperliquid
summary_title: Catball's pyramid NFTs, trait trading, and Hyperliquid's ecosystem maturation
summary_description: OG meme project reveals 5-tier NFT structure with ERC-1155 trait mechanics, addresses community drama around stablecoins and competitor launches.

key_moments.label: Catball's origin: accidental meme launch via age.fun in May
Spot market meme era ended; whales now farm points instead
NFT mint hit 1500 wallets, ~20k HYPE volume, ~$10M in value
5-tier pyramid structure: 1416 Tier 1 to 20 Tier 5 NFTs
ERC-721 art reveal in 2-4 weeks, then ERC-1155 trait splitting
Roguelike game design document done; funding constraints block development
Catball critiques PayPal/Paxos integration as ideological threat
Competitors (CZ perps, Aster, Avantis) can't match Hyperliquid's execution

pull_quote: Hyperliquid is winning because 11 people are generating billions yearly and actually threatening the cartels, while competitors arrive three years late with endless capital.
